holdings.infoBox: GDXY is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax Gold Miners Option Income Strategy ETF (GDXY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the VanEck Gold Miners ETF (GDX) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. GDXY was launched on May 20, 2024 and is issued by YieldMax.
